etymology.description: Depicts a footprint pointing up -> stylized as 龰 -> derivative 趾 (zhǐ, 'toe') retains original meaning
etymology.interpretation: 龰 symbolizes a stylized representation of feet or foot movement, aligning with its portrayal as a footprint pointing upwards. It is used in reference to foot-related contexts and concepts, maintaining its visual and semantic links to the original depiction of a foot.
